findings.title: "Doctors hate this" clickbait
findings.evidence: Doctors HATE this one weird trick
findings.why: Suppressed-secret clickbait is prohibited and a fast path to account suspension.
findings.suggestedFix: Describe the product plainly without 'doctors hate this' framing.

findings.title: Disease cure claim
findings.why: Claiming to cure or reverse a disease is prohibited for non-drug products.
findings.suggestedFix: Drop disease claims; describe general wellness support only.

findings.title: Unsubstantiated health claim
findings.why: "Clinically proven" needs real substantiation or it reads as misleading.
findings.suggestedFix: Remove 'clinically proven' or link a real study on the landing page.

findings.title: Missing affiliate disclosure
findings.why: A material connection (affiliate commission) must be disclosed clearly and conspicuously.
findings.suggestedFix: Add a visible 'I earn a commission' disclosure next to the link.
